item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-04-04
item.description: US job growth exceeded expectations in March, but rising prices and geopolitical tensions are raising concerns about economic stability.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-04-03
item.description: The US jobs market showed positive growth in March, but concerns remain over the impact of rising oil prices and corporate fee increases.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-04-02
item.description: Oil prices surged following Trump's warning to Iran, while Blue Owl Capital limited withdrawals amid investor concerns over the unregulated lending market.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-04-01
item.description: SpaceX confidentially files for a public offering, while oil prices drop and markets rally amid geopolitical tensions.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-31
item.description: US average fuel prices exceed $4 per gallon for the first time in four years amid ongoing conflict in Iran, impacting markets and consumer sentiment.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-30
item.description: Brent crude oil prices surged to $116 a barrel amid escalating tensions in the Middle East, while US stock markets continued to decline for the fifth consecutive week.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-29
item.description: US churches are increasingly developing affordable housing on underutilized land as border businesses suffer from reduced Canadian tourism amid rising oil prices and economic challenges.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-28
item.description: US border businesses face challenges as Canadian tourists decline, while the stock market continues to struggle amid rising oil prices and geopolitical tensions.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-27
item.description: US stock markets closed down for the fifth consecutive week amid rising oil prices and geopolitical tensions related to the Iran war.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-26
item.description: US markets experienced significant declines amid ongoing geopolitical tensions, while rising energy costs impact various sectors and consumer services.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-25
item.description: Global stock markets rose on optimism over a potential Iran peace plan, while concerns about fuel shortages and rising costs persist.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-24
item.description: TSA workers face uncertainty amid a government shutdown, while Delta Airlines suspends special services for Congress members as funding battles continue.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-23
item.description: Stock markets reacted to geopolitical tensions as oil prices fell following Trump's postponement of strikes on Iran, while the IEA warns of a significant energy crisis.

item.title: Business News Summary — 2026-03-22
item.description: The ongoing Iran war is causing significant economic concerns, including rising oil prices, stock market dips, and increased interest in electric vehicles.
